source: Bundlephobia browser gzip bundle sizes for latest npm packages, plus local latency benchmark of packages installed from npm.
note: Sizes are each package's browser gzip bundle from Bundlephobia at its latest version: what a browser downloads after bundling and compression. Latency is each package's direct hex path timed locally over 64 rotating uncached inputs with tinybench, the same method as this repository's headline latency gate (tools/measure-bench.mjs).

packages.name: color-hash
packages.note: BKDR path; SHA-256 default near 4,919 ns
